value.stringValue: Error deleting {!recordToBeDeleted} in Scheduled Service Reversal Screen Flow

decisions.description: Is the work order completed? If so, then we have other fields to adjust

recordUpdates.label: Update Work Asset with Previous WO records

fields.name: no_records_found_0
fields.fieldText: There are insufficient Work Orders to reverse that are associated with this Asset.

fields.name: description_0
fields.fieldText: The details of the latest scheduled service Work Order are below. By clicking confirm this Work Order record will be deleted. The Assets service record will be changed to details stored in the previous Work Order.

fields.name: description_0_0
fields.fieldText: The details of the latest scheduled service Work Order are below. By clicking confirm this Work Order record will be deleted. The Assets service record will be changed to details stored in the previous Work Order.

fields.name: description_0_0_0
fields.fieldText: The details of the latest scheduled service Work Order are below. By clicking confirm this Work Order record will be deleted. The Assets service record will be changed to details stored in the previous Work Order.

fields.name: success_screen_0
fields.fieldText: Work Order has been successfully deleted. Changes to the Asset have been made.
